{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Queen’s Gift
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Queen’s Gift]] is a condensed gem and one of the few Divine Treasures of [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Queen’s Gift]] is a crystallized command that allows others to borrow the [[Luminous Queen]]'s political and conceptual authority.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
